results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'A little cold, a little resilience' is soft and poetic but lacks a concrete, scroll-stopping payoff — no number, no tension, no contrarian angle.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one digestible idea and the action (10–20 second cold finish) is specific enough to try this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 20–35s skew toward 'does this actually work' framing, not 'calm little practice' — the tone is too gentle for the audience's urgency.
rationales.novelty: Cold exposure content is saturated and this deck takes no contrarian or surprising angle to differentiate from the hundreds of cold shower carousels already out there.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged, voice is plain and never hypey, and the CTA ties back to the Health Score naturally.
rationales.predicted_performance: Weak hook plus generic topic means low save/share rate — nothing here gives a viewer a reason to bookmark it over the dozen cold-shower posts they've already seen.
